title: satureja myriantha var. wellmanii
intro: Satureja myriantha var. wellmanii, also known as Wellman's savory, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Satureja myriantha plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as carvacrol and thymol. The health benefits of Satureja myriantha var. wellmanii include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
